title: Lead Investment Banker at Niva Bupa

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Niva Bupa
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Niva Bupa in Lucknow is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Niva Bupa:
Niva Bupa is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Niva Bupa!
